name: Li Cheng Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Li Cheng Enterprise Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells 3D spacer fabrics worldwide. Its products are used in shoe materials, such as bags, hats, underwear bras, general garments, mattresses, sports Equipment, medical, and automotive materials, etc. The company also provides polyester and nylon monofilaments; and other materials, such as PP and others. Li Cheng Enterprise Co., Ltd. founded 1992 and is based in Douliu, Taiwan.
